---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new diagnostic tool/resource/prompt or an improvement
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

**What MCP client behavior should this help test?**
mcpbin exists to let MCP *client* developers validate their implementation. Describe the
client-side behavior or edge case this feature would exercise.

**Proposed addition**
e.g. a new tool/resource/prompt, a new profile, UI improvement, etc. Include the proposed
name and shape (arguments, response) if you have one.

**Why existing endpoints don't cover it**
What's missing from the current catalog.

**Additional context**
Links to the MCP spec section, examples, or prior art (e.g. how httpbin handles the REST
equivalent).
